classifications.phrase: the worst of the global economic contraction has now passed
the downturn has been less severe than earlier expected
There has also been a pick-up in retail spending
The Board will not increase the cash rate target until progress is being made towards…
inflation will be sustainably within the 2–3 per cent target band

payload.rationale: The statement signals a dovish hold, maintaining accommodative policy while noting some economic stabilization but emphasizing that rate increases require progress on employment and inflation targets.
